personal.name: Sridhar J
personal.title: MERN Stack Developer
personal.tagline: MERN Stack Developer | Next.js & TypeScript Enthusiast | Building modern, scalable web applications
personal.bio: I am a motivated Computer Science Engineer and MERN Stack Developer with expertise in Next.js and TypeScript. Currently working as a React Developer at Jayam Web Solutions, I have hands-on experience in designing and developing scalable, high-performance web applications. I specialize in full-stack development, database management, and modern web technologies. Strong understanding of clean coding practices, SDLC, and performance optimization.

hero.subText: MERN Stack Developer with expertise in Next.js & TypeScript | Building scalable, modern web applications

about.heading: About Me
about.subheading: Passionate about building reliable, scalable web applications
about.description: I am a Computer Science Engineer and MERN Stack Developer at Jayam Web Solutions with expertise in full-stack web development. I focus on writing clean, efficient, and testable code while following best practices in SDLC. With strong hands-on experience in React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, and databases (MySQL, MongoDB), I build complete end-to-end solutions that are performant, scalable, and user-friendly. I specialize in designing high-performance web applications and optimizing performance across the full software development lifecycle. I'm passionate about problem-solving, continuous learning, and enhancing user experiences through modern technology.

experience.description: Designed and developed high-performance web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, and Express.js. Wrote clean, efficient, and testable code, integrated RESTful APIs, optimized performance and stability, supported software releases, and collaborated through code reviews to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions.

internships.description: Gained hands-on experience in frontend and backend development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and MySQL. Worked on building web applications and database management.
Completed a week-long internship on Android Development and attended a 2-day workshop on Adobe Photoshop.

college.institution: Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology
college.description: CGPA: 7.6/10. Specialized in full-stack development and database management. Actively participated in technical conferences and presentations.

school.description: Percentage: 82%. Focused on core subjects including Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science.
Percentage: 75-76%. Strong foundation in academics and problem-solving skills.

projects.title: Student ID Card Barcode Scanning System
projects.description: A web-based attendance generation system using barcode scanning. Implemented features such as student information retrieval, attendance sheet management, and real-time barcode scanning using HTML5 QR Scanning & JsBarcode. Enables automated student tracking, reduces manual errors, and improves record accuracy.
highlights: Reduced manual errors and improved accuracy

projects.title: Spotify Clone
projects.description: A dynamic and responsive music streaming platform inspired by Spotify. Features seamless UI interactions, real-time audio control, and modular component architecture with a clean, professional design.

projects.title: Weather Application
projects.description: A dynamic weather application integrating real-time weather APIs to provide current weather conditions. Features an NLP-based query system for improved user interactions and intuitive weather information display.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and developed a portfolio to showcase projects, skills, and contact information in a visually engaging and professional layout.

certificates.title: Full Stack Development Certification
certificates.description: Comprehensive training in full-stack development with hands-on experience

certificates.title: Technical Paper Presentation
certificates.description: Presented technical paper on 'Student ID Card Barcode Scanning for Attendance Generation'
